title: Console panel refinements
summary: Renamed the admin panel to Console, moved it to the bottom of the sidebar, localized it into all supported languages, and paginated user management.
bullets: The admin entry is now called Console and sits above Version log in the left menu.
The Configuration Manager (Console) now follows your selected app language.
User management lists 10 records per page with Prev/Next paging.

title: Version log added
summary: Added a bottom-sidebar version log and a latest-update badge in the information center.
bullets: Open the new Version log button from the left menu.
Review recent release notes and PR-style updates in one place.
See the information center timestamp refresh from the latest log entry.

title: Initial v0.1 release
summary: Launched the Notion-style workspace with the TipTap editor, publishing, revisions, and multilingual UI.
bullets: Block editor with slash commands, checklists, callouts, images, and page references.
Workspaces, permissions, publish-to-web, search, trash, and revision history.
7 languages, 4 themes, and adjustable font size.
